title: FM Band Discovery Lab
objective: Capture local FM broadcast activity and identify dominant stations with annotations.

steps.text: Open recording with FM defaults and capture a short snapshot.
steps.hint: Use the virtual device if no dongle is available.
steps.expected_outcome: A new FM-focused recording is saved.

steps.text: Process all recordings to generate processed summaries.
steps.hint: This computes PSD metrics used for quick station detection.
steps.expected_outcome: Processed JSON files appear under data/recordings/processed.

steps.text: Open advanced view for the latest recording and inspect strongest peaks.
steps.hint: Enable peak markers and compare candidate station frequencies.
steps.expected_outcome: You can annotate at least two prominent peaks.

steps.text: Add annotations to notable peaks and save your project.
steps.hint: Right-click near each peak to add a quick note.
steps.expected_outcome: Annotations are visible and can be restored from project save.

title: WiFi/Bluetooth RFI Survey
objective: Run built-in RFI mapping for common 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz profiles and compare congestion levels.

steps.text: Run RFI mapping for WiFi 2.4 GHz profile.
steps.hint: Virtual source can emulate activity if hardware is unavailable.
steps.expected_outcome: RFI map plot appears with average power points.

steps.text: Run RFI mapping for WiFi 5 GHz profile.
steps.hint: Compare map shape and average level versus 2.4 GHz.
steps.expected_outcome: Second map is generated for side-by-side interpretation.

steps.text: Run RFI mapping for Bluetooth 2.4 GHz profile.
steps.hint: Bluetooth profiles typically show narrower hopping-like signatures.
steps.expected_outcome: Third map is available for classroom comparison.

steps.text: Summarize which profile looked most congested and why.
steps.hint: Use average dB levels and spread across frequencies in each map.
steps.expected_outcome: A short RFI interpretation statement is recorded in class notes.

title: Gain Comparison Challenge
objective: Capture low- and high-gain snapshots and quantify the delta spectrum.

steps.text: Record a low-gain baseline snapshot.
steps.hint: Use same center/rate for both captures.
steps.expected_outcome: Low-gain dataset saved.

steps.text: Record a high-gain snapshot with identical center/rate.
steps.hint: Only gain should change between captures.
steps.expected_outcome: High-gain dataset saved.

steps.text: Run compare mode on the latest two recordings.
steps.hint: Inspect B - A delta to identify gain-sensitive regions.
steps.expected_outcome: Comparison window shows peak shift and SNR delta.

steps.text: Open advanced view for the latest recording and annotate one high-delta region.
steps.hint: Capture one explanatory note for classroom discussion.
steps.expected_outcome: At least one annotation is added and visible in spectrum view.

title: Interference Timeline
objective: Capture repeated snapshots and compare temporal changes in nearby interference.

steps.text: Record a first snapshot now.
steps.hint: Wait 30-60 seconds before next step if possible.
steps.expected_outcome: First timeline snapshot saved.

steps.text: Record a second snapshot at the same settings.
steps.hint: Keep setup unchanged to isolate time variation.
steps.expected_outcome: Second timeline snapshot saved.

steps.text: Compare the two latest snapshots.
steps.hint: Look for dB shifts and changed peak prominence.
steps.expected_outcome: Temporal delta is visible in comparison plot.

steps.text: Open advanced view and annotate one stable and one changing feature.
steps.expected_outcome: Two notes are added for stability vs variation discussion.

title: No-Dongle Starter Lesson
objective: Complete a full capture-process-analyze cycle using the built-in virtual network source.

steps.text: Launch recording preconfigured for built-in virtual source.
steps.expected_outcome: A virtual-source recording is saved locally.

steps.text: Process recordings to compute PSD summaries.
steps.expected_outcome: Processed output appears in the processed folder.

steps.text: Open advanced view and inspect peaks/waterfall.
steps.expected_outcome: Interactive analysis window opens with latest capture.

steps.text: Add at least one annotation and save project.
steps.expected_outcome: Session can be reopened with annotation preserved.
